text: This space feels clean, purposeful, and geared toward intellectual curiosity. The quiet, clinical atmosphere imparted by the glass and minimalism inspires contemplation. The "R + D" wall hints at innovation, research, and collaboration between humans and technology. I experience a blend of intrigue and detachment—curious about what knowledge is curated here, yet aware of the impersonal, almost sterile environment. It feels like a place where ideas thrive but emotions dim, prompting me to reflect on the relationship between thinking and feeling in modern, designed spaces.
